reviews.review_description: Good 👍
Great game. Would be better with multiplayer

i made awesome guns didn't crash my game better than The  Game on my account Its insanely hard it's not .better than the game which these guns could make you feel pretty powerful just add some random not you creator but you made this game awesome.
I like it. The graphics are excellent. Very fun game. Thanks for your effort.

Had high hopes now they all got shot down by 1 game breaking  element

Why tell us to create your own gun ▄︻̷̿┻̿═━一
just for it to never shoot.  what does N/A Mean? 

yes I already made a gun its not rocket science
... 
 now im attempting To  make a 3rd gun ,  and all of a sudden its never shoots

i attached the bullet counter and it say N/A

I THREW AWAY THAT GUN. AND RE MADE IT... IT STILL SAYS N/a
this is dumb

The guns, grenades, and the dragon! all of these are excellent. Its a lot of fun to shoot from the platform (a lot of fun for people who experience motion sickness in games with a lot of movement). Crafting and customising the gun is also a lot of fun. Unbelievable that the game is free!!

It's a free game but don't let that fool you it's tough and it's very very fun the only complaint I have with it is when you log on there's a big flashing support developers okay you got a couple dollar one and a big one I got the couple dollar one supported on get fresh skins for the weapons only I do not know how to use the skins how to open them apply them I emailed them and never heard back oh no it's a really fun game.

This game is amazing and the only thing I want changed is the guns not respawning in their holster when I accidentally drop one. I don’t know how to describe this smoothly,  why would I want one of my guns to be behind me on the floor? It could only get there by accident. In a really high stress situation where every second counts, not being able to find one of your guns in time is enough to make you quit the game.

This is a must have! Yes it’s cartoony, yes it’s a wav shooter, no it will not be another trash title to clutter your menu!  

Why am I excited about this game? Because it’s actually fun and addictive! 

Just get it you won’t be disappointed! 

When you do, at least get the 1.99 skin pack in support so the devs can pass out energy drinks to keep updating this!
L

It is an awesome game and I loved every f*cking second of it but it needs more to do is all as it is so small but It is still awesome, my recommendation is to add a vs mode where you and a friend fight where one protects the crystals and the other gets a sort of points system they can use to prepare a wave and summon help mid wave where the points increase every wave.
I think this is the best wave defense EVER on VR. Definitely recommend. 😃

YOU GET TO CRAFT 3 DIFFERNT GUNS AND USE THEM TO DEFEND, IF THIS GAME COST 20$ I STILL WOULD HAVE GOTTEN IT, I HAVEN'T EVEN GOTTEN PAST THE FIRST WORLD BUT THIS GAME IS AMAZING, MORE PEOPLE NEED TO PLAY IT!!!
When I play free games there are TRASH 🚮 but some times you can find gold 🏆in the trash 🚮and that's what this game 🎮is BUT I know they're working on multiplayer that will make the game a 6 out of 5

The game was super cool and I like the mechanics

PS:I would really like some kind of open world
Very fun

This game is really good I saw on TikTok  the onley problem is when you buy both of the bundles I thot you get new weapons attachments but it’s just skins on the guns you already have it says new guns on the 15$ bundle but it’s just skins only skins
I saw this on an app lab game listing and it's very cool, you can build your own guns, and when they run out of ammo you can use them as a grenade.
I love it! I do wish there were more maps but even with more or less maps it’s still a masterpiece! Highly recommend this game!
I had a lot of fun! I really liked the concept of a wave shooter with customizable guns, a lot of options. The game runs smoothly, no issues. Developers are nice and resposive, deserving our support.
